.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 11 for the test job.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source/target configuration with the unified release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in modern Maven compiler plugin versions; release flag is the standard for cross-compilation and module path handling.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.why_exists: List.get(0) is not deprecated, but the migration recipe enforces the use of the new Java 21 API List.getFirst() for better readability and safety (throws NoSuchElementException if empty, though behavior is similar to IndexOutOfBoundsException here). This is a polishment as the old code compiles and runs on Java 21.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/OSDete.general_idea: Replace deprecated single-string argument in Runtime.exec with a String array to avoid shell parsing issues and deprecation warnings.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/OSDete.why_exists: Runtime.exec(String) is deprecated since Java 1.2 and may cause incorrect command parsing or security issues; while it still compiles, modern linters and strict migration recipes flag it as a breaking pattern to fix for robustness.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/BaseTest.ja.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
